summary: Frontend testing completed for The Doggy Bakery e-commerce site. All reported bugs have been verified as FIXED: 1) Product modal now displays as proper overlay popup using React Portal (createPortal), 2) Modal has dark backdrop (bg-black/70) covering entire viewport, 3) Close button (X) works correctly, 4) Backdrop click closes modal, 5) Pan India page products open in modal correctly, 6) Featured products on home page load from API (4 products shown), 7) Insights page 'Read More' opens full article modal correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx correctly uses createPortal from react-dom to render modal in document.body, escaping CSS transform stacking context issues
Modal has proper z-index (z-[9999]) and dark backdrop (bg-black/70)
handleBackdropClick correctly uses e.target === e.currentTarget to close modal only when clicking backdrop
Modal content uses e.stopPropagation() to prevent backdrop click from closing when clicking inside modal
Home.jsx correctly fetches featured products from API endpoint /api/products?limit=8&category=cakes
Insights.jsx ArticleModal component correctly implements overlay modal with close functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All reported bugs have been verified as fixed. Product modal now uses React Portal (createPortal) to render in document.body, which fixes the inline display issue caused by CSS transform stacking context. Pan India page shows 43 products from multiple categories (treats, desi-treats, nut-butters, pan-india). The 'Complete the Celebration' section shows related products based on the product's actual category, not the page context - this is working as designed.

home_page_featured_products.details: Home page loads 4 featured products from API (/api/products?limit=8&category=cakes)

product_modal_overlay_display.details: Product modal displays as proper overlay popup with fixed positioning and z-index 9999

product_modal_dark_backdrop.details: Modal has dark backdrop (bg-black/70) covering entire viewport

product_modal_close_button.details: Close button (X) visible in modal and closes modal when clicked

pan_india_page_products.details: Pan India page shows 43 products with correct title 'Pan India Delivery'

pan_india_modal_works.details: Product modal opens correctly on Pan India page as overlay

pan_india_complete_celebration.details: 'Complete the Celebration' section found in modal with 4 related products

insights_page_read_more.details: Read More button opens article modal as overlay

insights_article_modal_close.details: Article modal closes via X button

insights_card_click.details: Clicking insight card opens article modal

mobile_viewport_modal.details: Product modal opens and closes correctly on mobile (390x844)

bugs_verified_fixed: Product modal displaying INLINE instead of as popup overlay - FIXED: Now uses createPortal to render in document.body
Modal backdrop not covering viewport - FIXED: Modal has bg-black/70 backdrop with fixed inset-0
Modal close button not working - FIXED: X button closes modal correctly
Backdrop click not closing modal - FIXED: handleBackdropClick correctly closes modal

notes.pan_india_related_products: The 'Complete the Celebration' section shows related products based on the product's actual category (e.g., 'treats'), not the page context ('pan-india'). This is working as designed - the backend API returns complementary products based on the product's category. Products on Pan India page have categories like 'treats', 'desi-treats', 'nut-butters' - not 'pan-india' category.
